name: AllenNLP (Research NLP Framework)
pricing_notes: Open source (Apache-2.0); Allen Institute for AI (allenai); ARCHIVED

performance.notes: PyTorch-based; GPU training; slower than pure transformers for inference

agent_readiness.notes: ARCHIVED (January 2023) — Allen Institute discontinued development. PyTorch NLP research framework: configuration-driven training with Jsonnet configs. Datasets, models, predictors, training loops. Strong for NER, coreference, SRL, reading comprehension. Pre-trained models still available. Was influential for academic NLP research 2017-2022. Now superseded by Hugging Face ecosystem for most tasks.

gotchas: Python/PyTorch compatibility issues with newer versions
Superseded by Hugging Face Transformers for most use cases
best_when: Reproducing older AllenNLP-based academic NLP papers
Using specific pre-trained AllenNLP models (coreference, SRL)
avoid_when: New NLP projects (use Hugging Face Transformers instead)
summary: AllenNLP was Allen Institute's PyTorch NLP research framework — ARCHIVED January 2023. Strong for academic NLP research (NER, coreference, SRL, RC) 2017-2022. Now superseded by Hugging Face Transformers. Pre-trained models still available but use only for reproducing older papers or legacy systems. New projects should use Hugging Face Transformers or spaCy.
